SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION REPRESETMED BY WILLIAM COOPER, MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOPHANNA KONG IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KONG, SOPHANNA $434.49 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $589.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
